name: Claude Code Greenfield SvelteKit
description: Create a new Gitea repo, scaffold a SvelteKit app, review the code, capture browser evidence, and open a PR — fully powered by Claude Code agent.

document.name: claude-code-greenfield-sveltekit
document.title: Claude Code Greenfield SvelteKit
document.summary: Repo creation, SvelteKit scaffold, review, browser preview, and PR — all via Claude Code agent.

agentConfig.name: claude-setup
agentConfig.instructions: You are setting up a new Git repository. Use curl for API calls and git for repo operations.

with.prompt:
Scaffold a SvelteKit app at /tmp/${ .input.repo // "launch-day-dashboard-demo" } using npx.

App name: ${ .input.app_name // .input.repo // "Launch Day Dashboard" }
Headline: ${ .input.headline // "Launch Day Dashboard" }
UI brief: ${ .input.ui_brief // "Create a bold, cinematic landing page with animated metric cards, a segmented mode switch, and a large call-to-action that looks great in a screen recording." }

You MUST do ALL of these steps in order:

1. Save existing .git directory:
   cd /tmp/${ .input.repo // "launch-day-dashboard-demo" } && mv .git /tmp/${ .input.repo // "launch-day-dashboard-demo" }-git-backup

2. Scaffold using the official SvelteKit CLI (non-interactive):
   cd /tmp && npx sv create ${ .input.repo // "launch-day-dashboard-demo" } --template minimal --types ts --no-install --no-add-ons

3. Restore .git:
   rm -rf /tmp/${ .input.repo // "launch-day-dashboard-demo" }/.git && mv /tmp/${ .input.repo // "launch-day-dashboard-demo" }-git-backup /tmp/${ .input.repo // "launch-day-dashboard-demo" }/.git

4. Create a .gitignore with: node_modules, .svelte-kit, build

5. Replace src/routes/+page.svelte with a polished single-screen demo page for ${ .input.app_name // .input.repo // "Launch Day Dashboard" }.
   Requirements:
   - prominent headline exactly: ${ .input.headline // "Launch Day Dashboard" }
   - 3 visually distinct metric cards
   - one obvious interactive control using Svelte 5 $state (counter, segmented switch, or toggle)
   - a strong CTA button
   - styling that feels premium on video, not default starter styling
   - keep everything self-contained with no external APIs

6. Run: cd /tmp/${ .input.repo // "launch-day-dashboard-demo" } && npm install && npm run build

7. CRITICAL - commit and push:
   cd /tmp/${ .input.repo // "launch-day-dashboard-demo" } && git add -A && git status && git commit -m 'feat: scaffold SvelteKit demo app' && git push origin main --force

8. Verify: git log --oneline -3

If npx sv create fails, use 'npx create-svelte@latest ${ .input.repo // "launch-day-dashboard-demo" }' with --template skeleton instead.
Do NOT skip step 7. The commit and push are REQUIRED.

agentConfig.name: claude-scaffolder
agentConfig.instructions: You are scaffolding a SvelteKit application. Create files, install dependencies, verify the build passes, then COMMIT AND PUSH to git. The commit+push is the most important part - do not skip it.

with.prompt:
Ensure the scaffolded SvelteKit code is committed and pushed to the remote.

Run these commands in a SINGLE bash call:

cd /tmp/${ .input.repo // "launch-day-dashboard-demo" } && git add -A && git status && git diff --cached --stat && git commit -m 'feat: scaffold SvelteKit demo app' --allow-empty && git push origin main --force && git log --oneline -3 && echo 'PUSH COMPLETE'

If 'nothing to commit' appears, that's fine - still force push:
cd /tmp/${ .input.repo // "launch-day-dashboard-demo" } && git push origin main --force && echo 'PUSH COMPLETE'

Verify the remote has the files:
curl -s 'http://gitea-http.gitea.svc.cluster.local:3000/api/v1/repos/${ .input.owner // "giteaadmin" }/${ .input.repo // "launch-day-dashboard-demo" }/contents/' -H 'Authorization: token 89c4068bdf972389a23557227817bd99750ca225' | head -c 200

agentConfig.name: claude-commit-push
agentConfig.instructions: You MUST commit any uncommitted changes and force push to the remote. Run the commands exactly as given. Do not skip the push.

with.prompt:
Review the scaffolded SvelteKit code at /tmp/${ .input.repo // "launch-day-dashboard-demo" }.

1. Read package.json to check dependencies
2. Read src/routes/+page.svelte to confirm the page matches this brief: ${ .input.ui_brief // "Create a bold, cinematic landing page with animated metric cards, a segmented mode switch, and a large call-to-action that looks great in a screen recording." }
3. Verify the build passes: cd /tmp/${ .input.repo // "launch-day-dashboard-demo" } && npm run build
4. Check git log to confirm pushed commits: git log --oneline -5
5. Produce a brief review summary

Do NOT modify any files.

agentConfig.name: claude-reviewer
agentConfig.instructions: You are reviewing code. Read files, check the build, and produce a summary. Do NOT modify files.

with.command: cd /sandbox/${ .input.repo // "launch-day-dashboard-demo" } && ls -la && npm install --prefer-offline 2>&1 && echo install-done

with.demoSummary: ${ .input.ui_brief // "A polished one-page SvelteKit demo designed to look strong in a captured walkthrough." }
